  "content": "/**\n * Transcript import — orchestration, cleaning, and manifest management.\n * Port of scripts/_transcript_import.py\n */\n\nimport { copyFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, appendFileSync } from 'node:fs'\nimport { dirname, extname, join, relative } from 'node:path'\n\nimport type { ManifestEntry, ParsedTranscript } from '../types/transcript.js'\nimport { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'\nimport {\n  loadJson,\n  normalizeTimestamp,\n  sha256File,\n  slugify,\n  timestampPartition,\n  yamlEscape,\n} from './common.js'\nimport { upsertSearchIndex } from './db.js'\n\nexport async function importTranscript(\n  parsed: ParsedTranscript,\n  root: string,\n  globalRoot: string,\n  projectSlug: string,\n  rawUploadPermission: string,\n  mirrorToRepo = true,\n): Promise<ManifestEntry> {\n  const importedAt = normalizeTimestamp(new Date())\n  const rawSha256 = sha256File(parsed.source_path)\n  const sessionLabel = slugify(\n    parsed.session_id,\n    slugify(stemOf(parsed.source_path), 'session'),\n  )\n  const artifactStem = `${sessionLabel}__${rawSha256.slice(0, 8)}`\n  const sourceSuffix = extname(parsed.source_path) || '.txt'\n\n  const [yearToken, monthToken] = timestampPartition(parsed.started_at || importedAt)\n\n  const repoRoot = join(root, 'Memory', '06_transcripts')\n  const repoRawPath = join(repoRoot, 'raw', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}${sourceSuffix}`)\n  const repoCleanPath = join(repoRoot, 'clean', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.md`)\n  const repoManifestPath = join(repoRoot, 'manifests', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)\n\n  const globalRawPath = join(globalRoot, 'raw', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}${sourceSuffix}`)\n  const globalCleanPath = join(globalRoot, 'clean', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.md`)\n  const globalManifestPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'manifests', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)\n  const globalEventLogPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'sessions.jsonl')\n  const globalDbPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'search.sqlite')\n\n  for (const p of [globalRawPath, globalCleanPath, globalManifestPath, globalEventLogPath, globalDbPath]) {\n    mkdirSync(dirname(p), { recursive: true })\n  }\n  if (mirrorToRepo) {\n    for (const p of [repoRawPath, repoCleanPath, repoManifestPath]) {\n      mkdirSync(dirname(p), { recursive: true })\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (mirrorToRepo) {\n    copyFile(parsed.source_path, repoRawPath)\n  }\n  copyFile(parsed.source_path, globalRawPath)\n\n  let manifest: ManifestEntry = {\n    client: parsed.client,\n    project: projectSlug,\n    session_id: parsed.session_id,\n    title: parsed.title,\n    started_at: parsed.started_at,\n    imported_at: importedAt,\n    cwd: parsed.cwd,\n    branch: parsed.branch,\n    raw_source_path: toPosixPath(parsed.source_path),\n    raw_sha256: rawSha256,\n    raw_upload_permission: rawUploadPermission,\n    repo_raw_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoRawPath)) : '',\n    repo_clean_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoCleanPath)) : '',\n    repo_manifest_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoManifestPath)) : '',\n    global_raw_path: toPosixPath(globalRawPath),\n    global_clean_path: toPosixPath(globalCleanPath),\n    global_manifest_path: toPosixPath(globalManifestPath),\n    message_count: parsed.messages.length,\n    tool_event_count: parsed.tool_events.length,\n    cleaning_mode: 'deterministic-code',\n    repo_mirror_enabled: mirrorToRepo,\n  }\n\n  const existingGlobalManifest = loadJson(globalManifestPath)\n  manifest = preserveExistingImportTimestamp(existingGlobalManifest, manifest)\n\n  if (mirrorToRepo) {\n    writeCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest, repoCleanPath)\n  }\n  writeCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest, globalCleanPath)\n  if (mirrorToRepo) {\n    writeJson(repoManifestPath, manifest)\n  }\n  const appendToEventLog = existingGlobalManifest === null || !deepEqual(existingGlobalManifest, manifest)\n  writeJson(globalManifestPath, manifest)\n  if (appendToEventLog) {\n    appendJsonl(globalEventLogPath, manifest)\n  }\n  await upsertSearchIndex(globalDbPath, manifest)\n\n  return manifest\n}\n\nexport function transcriptHasContent(parsed: ParsedTranscript): boolean {\n  return parsed.messages.length > 0 || parsed.tool_events.length > 0\n}\n\nexport function writeCleanMarkdown(parsed: ParsedTranscript, manifest: ManifestEntry, filePath: string): void {\n  const lines: string[] = [\n    '---',\n    `client: ${manifest.client}`,\n    `project: ${manifest.project}`,\n    `session_id: ${manifest.session_id}`,\n    `title: ${yamlEscape(manifest.title)}`,\n    `started_at: ${manifest.started_at}`,\n    `imported_at: ${manifest.imported_at}`,\n    `cwd: ${yamlEscape(manifest.cwd)}`,\n    `branch: ${yamlEscape(manifest.branch)}`,\n    `raw_source_path: ${yamlEscape(manifest.raw_source_path)}`,\n    `raw_sha256: ${manifest.raw_sha256}`,\n    `raw_upload_permission: ${manifest.raw_upload_permission}`,\n    `cleaning_mode: ${manifest.cleaning_mode}`,\n    '---',\n    '',\n    `# ${manifest.title || manifest.session_id}`,\n    '',\n    '## Metadata',\n    `- Client: \\`${manifest.client}\\``,\n    `- Project: \\`${manifest.project}\\``,\n    `- Session ID: \\`${manifest.session_id}\\``,\n    `- Started At: \\`${manifest.started_at}\\``,\n    `- Imported At: \\`${manifest.imported_at}\\``,\n    `- Raw SHA256: \\`${manifest.raw_sha256}\\``,\n    `- Raw Source: \\`${manifest.raw_source_path}\\``,\n    `- Repo Raw Path: \\`${manifest.repo_raw_path}\\``,\n    `- Repo Clean Path: \\`${manifest.repo_clean_path}\\``,\n    '',\n    '## Messages',\n  ]\n\n  if (parsed.messages.length > 0) {\n    for (let i = 0; i < parsed.messages.length; i++) {\n      const message = parsed.messages[i]!\n      lines.push(\n        `### ${i + 1}. ${message.role}`,\n        `- Timestamp: \\`${message.timestamp ?? manifest.started_at}\\``,\n        '',\n        message.text,\n        '',\n      )\n    }\n  } else {\n    lines.push(\n      'No user or assistant messages were extracted deterministically from the source transcript.',\n      '',\n    )\n  }\n\n  lines.push('## Tool Events')\n  if (parsed.tool_events.length > 0) {\n    for (const event of parsed.tool_events) {\n      lines.push(`- \\`${event.timestamp ?? manifest.started_at}\\` ${event.summary}`)\n    }\n  } else {\n    lines.push('- No tool events were extracted.')\n  }\n  lines.push('')\n\n  writeFileSync(filePath, lines.join('\\n'), 'utf-8')\n}\n\nexport function preserveExistingImportTimestamp(\n  existing: Record<string, unknown> | null,\n  payload: ManifestEntry,\n): ManifestEntry {\n  if (existing === null) return payload\n  if (!deepEqual(manifestSignature(existing), manifestSignature(payload))) return payload\n  const importedAt = existing['imported_at']\n  if (typeof importedAt === 'string' && importedAt) {\n    return { ...payload, imported_at: importedAt }\n  }\n  return payload\n}\n\nexport function manifestSignature(payload: Record<string, unknown>): Record<string, unknown> {\n  const result: Record<string, unknown> = {}\n  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(payload)) {\n    if (key !== 'imported_at') {\n      result[key] = value\n    }\n  }\n  return result\n}\n\nexport function manifestChanged(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): boolean {\n  if (!existsSync(filePath)) return true\n  try {\n    const current = JSON.parse(readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')) as Record<string, unknown>\n    return !deepEqual(current, payload)\n  } catch {\n    return true\n  }\n}\n\nexport function writeJson(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {\n  writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2) + '\\n', 'utf-8')\n}\n\nexport function appendJsonl(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {\n  appendFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(payload) + '\\n', 'utf-8')\n}\n\nexport function copyFile(source: string, destination: string): void {\n  if (source === destination) return\n  copyFileSync(source, destination)\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Internal helpers\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nfunction stemOf(filePath: string): string {\n  const base = filePath.replace(/\\\\/g, '/').split('/').pop() ?? ''\n  const ext = extname(base)\n  return ext ? base.slice(0, -ext.length) : base\n}\n\nfunction deepEqual(a: unknown, b: unknown): boolean {\n  if (a === b) return true\n  if (a === null || b === null || typeof a !== typeof b) return false\n  if (typeof a !== 'object') return false\n  if (Array.isArray(a) !== Array.isArray(b)) return false\n  const aObj = a as Record<string, unknown>\n  const bObj = b as Record<string, unknown>\n  const aKeys = Object.keys(aObj)\n  const bKeys = Object.keys(bObj)\n  if (aKeys.length !== bKeys.length) return false\n  return aKeys.every(key => deepEqual(aObj[key], bObj[key]))\n}\n"
}

Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Transcript parsing — client inference, dispatch, and format-specific parsers.
     3→ * Port of scripts/_transcript_parse.py
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import { readFileSync, statSync } from 'node:fs'
     7→import { basename, extname } from 'node:path'
     8→
     9→import type { Client, ParsedTranscript, TranscriptMessage, TranscriptToolEvent } from '../types/transcript.js'
    10→import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
    11→import {
    12→  SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES,
    13→  TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES,
    14→  TOOL_RESULT_TYPES,
    15→  TOOL_USE_TYPES,
    16→  deduplicateMessages,
    17→  deduplicateToolEvents,
    18→  earliestTimestamp,
    19→  ensureDict,
    20→  ensureList,
    21→  extractGeminiText,
    22→  extractTextBlocks,
    23→  findFirstMappingWithKeys,
    24→  getNested,
    25→  joinParagraphs,
    26→  loadJsonl,
    27→  normalizeTimestamp,
    28→  summarizeValue,
    29→} from './common.js'
    30→
    31→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    32→// Client inference + dispatch
    33→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    34→
    35→export function inferClient(client: string, sourcePath: string): Client {
    36→  if (client !== 'auto') {
    37→    return client as Client
    38→  }
    39→  const normalized = toPosixPath(sourcePath).toLowerCase()
    40→  const fileName = basename(sourcePath).toLowerCase()
    41→  if (normalized.includes('/.codex/') || fileName.startsWith('rollout-')) {
    42→    return 'codex'
    43→  }
    44→  if (normalized.includes('/.claude/') || normalized.includes('/projects/')) {
    45→    return 'claude'
    46→  }
    47→  if (normalized.includes('/.gemini/') || normalized.includes('checkpoint')) {
    48→    return 'gemini'
    49→  }
    50→  throw new Error(`could not infer transcript client from source path: ${sourcePath}`)
    51→}
    52→
    53→export function parseTranscript(client: string, sourcePath: string): ParsedTranscript {
    54→  const resolved = inferClient(client, sourcePath)
    55→  if (resolved === 'codex') {
    56→    return parseCodexTranscript(sourcePath)
    57→  }
    58→  if (resolved === 'claude') {
    59→    return parseClaudeTranscript(sourcePath)
    60→  }
    61→  if (resolved === 'gemini') {
    62→    return parseGeminiTranscript(sourcePath)
    63→  }
    64→  throw new Error(`unsupported transcript client: ${resolved}`)
    65→}
    66→
    67→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    68→// Codex parser
    69→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    70→
    71→export function parseCodexTranscript(filePath: string): ParsedTranscript {
    72→  const records = loadJsonl(filePath)
    73→  const stem = basename(filePath, extname(filePath))
    74→  let sessionId = stem
    75→  let title = stem
    76→  let startedAt = normalizeTimestamp(statSync(filePath).mtimeMs / 1000)
    77→  let cwd = ''
    78→  let branch = ''
    79→  const messages: TranscriptMessage[] = []
    80→  const toolEvents: TranscriptToolEvent[] = []
    81→
    82→  for (const record of records) {
    83→    const recordType = String(record['type'] ?? '')
    84→    const timestamp = normalizeTimestamp(record['timestamp'], startedAt)
    85→
    86→    if (recordType === 'session_meta') {
    87→      const payload = ensureDict(record['payload'])
    88→      sessionId = String(payload['id'] ?? '') || sessionId
    89→      title = String(payload['thread_name'] ?? '') || String(payload['title'] ?? '') || title
    90→      startedAt = earliestTimestamp(startedAt, payload['timestamp'])
    91→      cwd = String(payload['cwd'] ?? '') || cwd
    92→      branch = String(getNested(payload, 'git', 'branch') ?? '') || branch
    93→      continue
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    if (recordType !== 'response_item' && recordType !== 'event_msg') {
    97→      continue
    98→    }
    99→
   100→    const payload = ensureDict(record['payload'])
   101→    const payloadType = String(payload['type'] ?? '')
   102→
   103→    if (payloadType === 'message') {
   104→      const role = String(payload['role'] ?? '').toLowerCase()
   105→      if (role === 'user' || role === 'assistant') {
   106→        const text = extractTextBlocks(payload['content'])
   107→        if (text) {
   108→          messages.push({ role, text, timestamp })
   109→        }
   110→      }
   111→      continue
   112→    }
   113→
   114→    if (payloadType === 'user_message' || payloadType === 'agent_message') {
   115→      const role = payloadType === 'user_message' ? 'user' : 'assistant'
   116→      const text = String(payload['message'] ?? '').trim()
   117→      if (text) {
   118→        messages.push({ role, text, timestamp })
   119→      }
   120→      continue
   121→    }
   122→
   123→    if (payloadType === 'function_call') {
   124→      const name = String(payload['name'] ?? '') || 'function_call'
   125→      const args = payload['arguments'] ?? payload['input']
   126→      toolEvents.push({
   127→        summary: `${name} input=${summarizeValue(args)}`,
   128→        timestamp,
   129→      })
   130→      continue
   131→    }
   132→
   133→    if (payloadType === 'custom_tool_call') {
   134→      const name = String(payload['name'] ?? '') || String(payload['call_id'] ?? '') || 'custom_tool_call'
   135→      toolEvents.push({
   136→        summary: `${name} input=${summarizeValue(payload['input'])}`,
   137→        timestamp,
   138→      })
   139→      continue
   140→    }
   141→
   142→    if (payloadType === 'function_call_output') {
   143→      const name = String(payload['name'] ?? '') || String(payload['call_id'] ?? '') || 'function_call_output'
   144→      const output = payload['output'] ?? payload['content']
   145→      toolEvents.push({
   146→        summary: `${name} output=${summarizeValue(output)}`,
   147→        timestamp,
   148→      })
   149→      continue
   150→    }
   151→
   152→    if (payloadType === 'custom_tool_call_output') {
   153→      const name = String(payload['name'] ?? '') || String(payload['call_id'] ?? '') || 'custom_tool_call_output'
   154→      const output = payload['output'] ?? payload['content']
   155→      toolEvents.push({
   156→        summary: `${name} output=${summarizeValue(output)}`,
   157→        timestamp,
   158→      })
   159→    }
   160→  }
   161→
   162→  return {
   163→    client: 'codex',
   164→    session_id: sessionId,
   165→    title,
   166→    started_at: startedAt,
   167→    cwd,
   168→    branch,
   169→    messages: deduplicateMessages(messages),
   170→    tool_events: deduplicateToolEvents(toolEvents),
   171→    source_path: filePath,
   172→  }
   173→}
   174→
   175→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   176→// Claude parser
   177→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   178→
   179→export function parseClaudeTranscript(filePath: string): ParsedTranscript {
   180→  const records = loadJsonl(filePath)
   181→  const stem = basename(filePath, extname(filePath))
   182→  let sessionId = stem
   183→  const title = stem
   184→  let startedAt = normalizeTimestamp(statSync(filePath).mtimeMs / 1000)
   185→  let cwd = ''
   186→  let branch = ''
   187→  const messages: TranscriptMessage[] = []
   188→  const toolEvents: TranscriptToolEvent[] = []
   189→
   190→  for (const record of records) {
   191→    const recordType = String(record['type'] ?? '')
   192→    const timestamp = normalizeTimestamp(record['timestamp'], startedAt)
   193→    sessionId = String(record['sessionId'] ?? '') || sessionId
   194→    startedAt = earliestTimestamp(startedAt, record['timestamp'])
   195→    cwd = String(record['cwd'] ?? '') || cwd
   196→    branch = String(record['gitBranch'] ?? '') || branch
   197→
   198→    if (recordType !== 'user' && recordType !== 'assistant') {
   199→      continue
   200→    }
   201→
   202→    const message = ensureDict(record['message'])
   203→    const role = String(message['role'] ?? '').toLowerCase() || recordType
   204→    const textParts: string[] = []
   205→    const content = message['content']
   206→
   207→    if (typeof content === 'string') {
   208→      const text = content.trim()
   209→      if ((role === 'user' || role === 'assistant') && text) {
   210→        messages.push({ role, text, timestamp })
   211→      }
   212→      continue
   213→    }
   214→
   215→    for (const block of ensureList(content)) {
   216→      if (typeof block === 'string') {
   217→        if (block.trim()) {
   218→          textParts.push(block.trim())
   219→        }
   220→        continue
   221→      }
   222→      if (block === null || typeof block !== 'object' || Array.isArray(block)) {
   223→        continue
   224→      }
   225→      const rec = block as Record<string, unknown>
   226→      const blockType = String(rec['type'] ?? '').toLowerCase()
   227→
   228→      if (TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES.has(blockType)) {
   229→        const text = String(rec['text'] ?? '').trim()
   230→        if (text) {
   231→          textParts.push(text)
   232→        }
   233→        continue
   234→      }
   235→      if (SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES.has(blockType)) {
   236→        continue
   237→      }
   238→      if (TOOL_USE_TYPES.has(blockType)) {
   239→        const name = String(rec['name'] ?? '') || 'tool_use'
   240→        toolEvents.push({
   241→          summary: `${name} input=${summarizeValue(rec['input'])}`,
   242→          timestamp,
   243→        })
   244→        continue
   245→      }
   246→      if (TOOL_RESULT_TYPES.has(blockType)) {
   247→        const toolUseId = String(rec['tool_use_id'] ?? '') || 'tool_result'
   248→        toolEvents.push({
   249→          summary: `${toolUseId} output=${summarizeValue(rec['content'])}`,
   250→          timestamp,
   251→        })
   252→      }
   253→    }
   254→
   255→    const text = joinParagraphs(textParts)
   256→    if ((role === 'user' || role === 'assistant') && text) {
   257→      messages.push({ role, text, timestamp })
   258→    }
   259→  }
   260→
   261→  return {
   262→    client: 'claude',
   263→    session_id: sessionId,
   264→    title,
   265→    started_at: startedAt,
   266→    cwd,
   267→    branch,
   268→    messages: deduplicateMessages(messages),
   269→    tool_events: deduplicateToolEvents(toolEvents),
   270→    source_path: filePath,
   271→  }
   272→}
   273→
   274→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   275→// Gemini parser
   276→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   277→
   278→export function parseGeminiTranscript(filePath: string): ParsedTranscript {
   279→  const stem = basename(filePath, extname(filePath))
   280→  let sessionId = stem
   281→  const title = stem
   282→  let startedAt = normalizeTimestamp(statSync(filePath).mtimeMs / 1000)
   283→  let cwd = ''
   284→  let branch = ''
   285→  const messages: TranscriptMessage[] = []
   286→  const toolEvents: TranscriptToolEvent[] = []
   287→
   288→  let payload: unknown
   289→  if (extname(filePath).toLowerCase() === '.jsonl') {
   290→    payload = loadJsonl(filePath)
   291→  } else {
   292→    payload = JSON.parse(readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')) as unknown
   293→  }
   294→
   295→  const metaKeys: ReadonlySet<string> = new Set(['sessionId', 'chatId', 'cwd', 'branch', 'timestamp'])
   296→  const firstMeta = findFirstMappingWithKeys(payload, metaKeys)
   297→  if (firstMeta !== null) {
   298→    sessionId = String(firstMeta['sessionId'] ?? '') || String(firstMeta['chatId'] ?? '') || String(firstMeta['id'] ?? '') || sessionId
   299→    startedAt = earliestTimestamp(startedAt, firstMeta['timestamp'])
   300→    cwd = String(firstMeta['cwd'] ?? '') || String(firstMeta['projectRoot'] ?? '') || cwd
   301→    branch = String(firstMeta['branch'] ?? '') || branch
   302→  }
   303→
   304→  function visit(node: unknown): void {
   305→    if (Array.isArray(node)) {
   306→      for (const item of node) {
   307→        visit(item)
   308→      }
   309→      return
   310→    }
   311→    if (node === null || typeof node !== 'object') {
   312→      return
   313→    }
   314→    const rec = node as Record<string, unknown>
   315→
   316→    sessionId = String(rec['sessionId'] ?? '') || String(rec['chatId'] ?? '') || String(rec['id'] ?? '') || sessionId
   317→    startedAt = earliestTimestamp(startedAt, rec['timestamp'])
   318→    cwd = String(rec['cwd'] ?? '') || String(rec['projectRoot'] ?? '') || cwd
   319→    branch = String(rec['branch'] ?? '') || branch
   320→
   321→    const role = String(rec['role'] ?? rec['author'] ?? rec['sender'] ?? '').toLowerCase()
   322→    const timestamp = normalizeTimestamp(rec['timestamp'], startedAt)
   323→
   324→    if (role === 'user' || role === 'assistant' || role === 'model') {
   325→      const normalizedRole = role === 'model' ? 'assistant' : role
   326→      const text = extractGeminiText(rec)
   327→      if (text) {
   328→        messages.push({ role: normalizedRole, text, timestamp })
   329→      }
   330→    }
   331→
   332→    const toolName =
   333→      getNested(rec, 'toolUse', 'name') ??
   334→      rec['toolName'] ??
   335→      rec['functionName'] ??
   336→      rec['tool']
   337→    if (toolName) {
   338→      toolEvents.push({
   339→        summary: `${String(toolName)} input=${summarizeValue(rec['args'] ?? rec['input'])}`,
   340→        timestamp,
   341→      })
   342→    }
   343→
   344→    for (const value of Object.values(rec)) {
   345→      visit(value)
   346→    }
   347→  }
   348→
   349→  visit(payload)
   350→
   351→  return {
   352→    client: 'gemini',
   353→    session_id: sessionId,
   354→    title,
   355→    started_at: startedAt,
   356→    cwd,
   357→    branch,
   358→    messages: deduplicateMessages(messages),
   359→    tool_events: deduplicateToolEvents(toolEvents),
   360→    source_path: filePath,
   361→  }
   362→}
   363→
Tool Result #142 Read toolu_01JxmFyUMGhrfgpxeuEeoq7n 09:33:30
Read output=1→/** 2→ * Transcript search index — SQLite upsert for the global transcript catalog. 3→ * 4→ * Uses sql.js (WebAssembly SQLite) so the module works without a native 5→ * sqlite...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Transcript search index — SQLite upsert for the global transcript catalog.
     3→ *
     4→ * Uses sql.js (WebAssembly SQLite) so the module works without a native
     5→ * sqlite3 binding.  The WASM init is async; we cache the resulting factory
     6→ * promise so it is only resolved once per process.
     7→ */
     8→
     9→import initSqlJs, { type SqlJsStatic } from 'sql.js'
    10→import { existsSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync } from 'node:fs'
    11→import type { ManifestEntry } from '../types/transcript.js'
    12→
    13→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    14→// Lazy sql.js initialisation (cached promise)
    15→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    16→
    17→let sqlPromise: Promise<SqlJsStatic> | null = null
    18→
    19→function getSqlJs(): Promise<SqlJsStatic> {
    20→  if (sqlPromise === null) {
    21→    sqlPromise = initSqlJs()
    22→  }
    23→  return sqlPromise
    24→}
    25→
    26→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    27→// Column definitions
    28→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    29→
    30→const PK_COLUMNS = [
    31→  'client',
    32→  'project',
    33→  'session_id',
    34→  'raw_sha256',
    35→] as const
    36→
    37→const DATA_COLUMNS = [
    38→  'title',
    39→  'started_at',
    40→  'imported_at',
    41→  'cwd',
    42→  'branch',
    43→  'raw_source_path',
    44→  'raw_upload_permission',
    45→  'global_raw_path',
    46→  'global_clean_path',
    47→  'repo_raw_path',
    48→  'repo_clean_path',
    49→  'repo_manifest_path',
    50→  'message_count',
    51→  'tool_event_count',
    52→] as const
    53→
    54→const ALL_COLUMNS = [...PK_COLUMNS, ...DATA_COLUMNS] as const
    55→
    56→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    57→// SQL statements (built once)
    58→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    59→
    60→const CREATE_TABLE_SQL = `
    61→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS transcripts (
    62→    client              TEXT    NOT NULL,
    63→    project             TEXT    NOT NULL,
    64→    session_id          TEXT    NOT NULL,
    65→    raw_sha256          TEXT    NOT NULL,
    66→    title               TEXT    NOT NULL,
    67→    started_at          TEXT    NOT NULL,
    68→    imported_at         TEXT    NOT NULL,
    69→    cwd                 TEXT    NOT NULL,
    70→    branch              TEXT    NOT NULL,
    71→    raw_source_path     TEXT    NOT NULL,
    72→    raw_upload_permission TEXT  NOT NULL,
    73→    global_raw_path     TEXT    NOT NULL,
    74→    global_clean_path   TEXT    NOT NULL,
    75→    repo_raw_path       TEXT    NOT NULL,
    76→    repo_clean_path     TEXT    NOT NULL,
    77→    repo_manifest_path  TEXT    NOT NULL,
    78→    message_count       INTEGER NOT NULL,
    79→    tool_event_count    INTEGER NOT NULL,
    80→    PRIMARY KEY (client, project, session_id, raw_sha256)
    81→  )
    82→`
    83→
    84→const UPSERT_SQL = `
    85→  INSERT INTO transcripts (
    86→    ${ALL_COLUMNS.join(', ')}
    87→  ) VALUES (${ALL_COLUMNS.map(() => '?').join(', ')})
    88→  ON CONFLICT(${PK_COLUMNS.join(', ')}) DO UPDATE SET
    89→    ${DATA_COLUMNS.map((c) => `${c} = excluded.${c}`).join(',\n    ')}
    90→`
    91→
    92→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    93→// Public API
    94→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    95→
    96→/**
    97→ * Insert or update a single transcript manifest row in the SQLite search
    98→ * index at `dbPath`.  Creates the database and table if they do not exist.
    99→ *
   100→ * The function is async because the first call must initialise the sql.js
   101→ * WASM module.
   102→ */
   103→export async function upsertSearchIndex(
   104→  dbPath: string,
   105→  manifest: ManifestEntry,
   106→): Promise<void> {
   107→  const SQL = await getSqlJs()
   108→
   109→  const db = existsSync(dbPath)
   110→    ? new SQL.Database(readFileSync(dbPath))
   111→    : new SQL.Database()
   112→
   113→  try {
   114→    db.run('PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL')
   115→    db.run(CREATE_TABLE_SQL)
   116→
   117→    const record: Record<string, unknown> = { ...manifest }
   118→    const params = ALL_COLUMNS.map((col) => {
   119→      const value = record[col]
   120→      if (value === undefined || value === null) {
   121→        return ''
   122→      }
   123→      return typeof value === 'number' ? value : String(value)
   124→    })
   125→
   126→    db.run(UPSERT_SQL, params)
   127→
   128→    const data = db.export()
   129→    writeFileSync(dbPath, Buffer.from(data))
   130→  } finally {
   131→    db.close()
   132→  }
   133→}
   134→
Tool Result #143 Read toolu_01Xpd2FFxjNgLfWpKFuBn5Nn 09:33:30
Read output=1→/** 2→ * Transcript discovery — file scanning and project matching. 3→ * Port of scripts/_transcript_discover.py 4→ */ 5→ 6→import { existsSync, statSync } from 'node:fs' 7→im...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Transcript discovery — file scanning and project matching.
     3→ * Port of scripts/_transcript_discover.py
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import { existsSync, statSync } from 'node:fs'
     7→import { homedir } from 'node:os'
     8→import { basename, dirname, resolve } from 'node:path'
     9→
    10→import fg from 'fast-glob'
    11→
    12→import type { ParsedTranscript } from '../types/transcript.js'
    13→import { slugify, CLIENTS } from './common.js'
    14→import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
    15→
    16→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    17→// Glob patterns per client
    18→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    19→
    20→const CLIENT_PATTERNS: Readonly<Record<string, readonly string[]>> = {
    21→  codex: ['sessions/**/*.jsonl'],
    22→  claude: ['projects/**/*.jsonl'],
    23→  gemini: [
    24→    'tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.json',
    25→    'tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.jsonl',
    26→    'history/**/*.json',
    27→    'history/**/*.jsonl',
    28→    'chats/**/*.json',
    29→    'chats/**/*.jsonl',
    30→  ],
    31→}
    32→
    33→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    34→// Defaults
    35→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    36→
    37→export function defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot(): string {
    38→  return toPosixPath(resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', 'transcripts'))
    39→}
    40→
    41→export function defaultClientRoots(): Record<string, string> {
    42→  const home = homedir()
    43→  return {
    44→    codex: resolve(home, '.codex'),
    45→    claude: resolve(home, '.claude'),
    46→    gemini: resolve(home, '.gemini'),
    47→  }
    48→}
    49→
    50→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    51→// File discovery
    52→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    53→
    54→export function discoverSourceFiles(
    55→  clients?: ReadonlySet<string>,
    56→  roots?: Readonly<Record<string, string>>,
    57→): Array<[string, string]> {
    58→  const requested = clients ?? CLIENTS
    59→  const resolvedRoots = roots ?? defaultClientRoots()
    60→  const matches: Array<[string, string]> = []
    61→  const seen = new Set<string>()
    62→
    63→  for (const client of [...requested].sort()) {
    64→    const root: string | undefined = resolvedRoots[client]
    65→    if (root === undefined || !existsSync(root)) continue
    66→
    67→    const patterns = CLIENT_PATTERNS[client]
    68→    if (patterns === undefined) continue
    69→
    70→    for (const pattern of patterns) {
    71→      const paths = fg.sync(pattern, { cwd: root, absolute: true, onlyFiles: true })
    72→      for (const filePath of paths) {
    73→        const resolved = toPosixPath(resolve(filePath))
    74→        const key = resolved.toLowerCase()
    75→        if (seen.has(key)) continue
    76→        seen.add(key)
    77→        matches.push([client, resolved])
    78→      }
    79→    }
    80→  }
    81→
    82→  matches.sort((a, b) => {
    83→    const mtimeA = safeFileMtime(a[1])
    84→    const mtimeB = safeFileMtime(b[1])
    85→    if (mtimeB !== mtimeA) return mtimeB - mtimeA
    86→    const pathA = a[1].toLowerCase()
    87→    const pathB = b[1].toLowerCase()
    88→    // Reverse sort: higher path string comes first (matching Python's reverse=True)
    89→    if (pathB > pathA) return 1
    90→    if (pathB < pathA) return -1
    91→    return 0
    92→  })
    93→
    94→  return matches
    95→}
    96→
    97→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    98→// Project slug inference
    99→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   100→
   101→export function inferProjectSlug(parsed: ParsedTranscript): string {
   102→  if (parsed.cwd) {
   103→    try {
   104→      const cwdBase = basename(parsed.cwd)
   105→      return slugify(cwdBase, 'project')
   106→    } catch {
   107→      // fall through
   108→    }
   109→  }
   110→
   111→  if (parsed.client === 'claude') {
   112→    let parentName = basename(dirname(parsed.source_path)).toLowerCase()
   113→    parentName = parentName.replace(/^[a-z]--/, '')
   114→    return slugify(parentName, 'project')
   115→  }
   116→
   117→  if (parsed.client === 'gemini') {
   118→    const parentDir = basename(dirname(parsed.source_path))
   119→    if (parentDir) {
   120→      return slugify(parentDir, 'project')
   121→    }
   122→  }
   123→
   124→  return 'unknown-project'
   125→}
   126→
   127→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   128→// Repo matching
   129→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   130→
   131→export function transcriptMatchesRepo(
   132→  parsed: ParsedTranscript,
   133→  repoRoot: string,
   134→  repoSlug: string,
   135→): boolean {
   136→  const normalizedRepo = toPosixPath(resolve(repoRoot)).toLowerCase()
   137→
   138→  if (parsed.cwd) {
   139→    try {
   140→      const normalizedCwd = toPosixPath(resolve(parsed.cwd)).toLowerCase()
   141→      if (normalizedCwd === normalizedRepo) return true
   142→      // Check if repoRoot is a parent of cwd
   143→      const repoPrefix = normalizedRepo.endsWith('/')
   144→        ? normalizedRepo
   145→        : normalizedRepo + '/'
   146→      if (normalizedCwd.startsWith(repoPrefix)) return true
   147→    } catch {
   148→      // fall through
   149→    }
   150→  }
   151→
   152→  return projectSlugsMatch(inferProjectSlug(parsed), repoSlug)
   153→}
   154→
   155→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   156→// Slug matching
   157→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   158→
   159→export function projectSlugsMatch(left: string, right: string): boolean {
   160→  return Boolean(
   161→    left && right && left === right && left !== 'unknown-project',
   162→  )
   163→}
   164→
   165→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   166→// Safe mtime
   167→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   168→
   169→export function safeFileMtime(filePath: string): number {
   170→  try {
   171→    return statSync(filePath).mtimeMs / 1000
   172→  } catch {
   173→    return 0
   174→  }
   175→}
   176→

Read output=1→/** 2→ * Transcript import — orchestration, cleaning, and manifest management. 3→ * Port of scripts/_transcript_import.py 4→ */ 5→ 6→import { copyFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSy...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Transcript import — orchestration, cleaning, and manifest management.
     3→ * Port of scripts/_transcript_import.py
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import { copyFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, appendFileSync } from 'node:fs'
     7→import { dirname, extname, join, relative } from 'node:path'
     8→
     9→import type { ManifestEntry, ParsedTranscript } from '../types/transcript.js'
    10→import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
    11→import {
    12→  loadJson,
    13→  normalizeTimestamp,
    14→  sha256File,
    15→  slugify,
    16→  timestampPartition,
    17→  yamlEscape,
    18→} from './common.js'
    19→import { upsertSearchIndex } from './db.js'
    20→
    21→export async function importTranscript(
    22→  parsed: ParsedTranscript,
    23→  root: string,
    24→  globalRoot: string,
    25→  projectSlug: string,
    26→  rawUploadPermission: string,
    27→  mirrorToRepo = true,
    28→): Promise<ManifestEntry> {
    29→  const importedAt = normalizeTimestamp(new Date())
    30→  const rawSha256 = sha256File(parsed.source_path)
    31→  const sessionLabel = slugify(
    32→    parsed.session_id,
    33→    slugify(stemOf(parsed.source_path), 'session'),
    34→  )
    35→  const artifactStem = `${sessionLabel}__${rawSha256.slice(0, 8)}`
    36→  const sourceSuffix = extname(parsed.source_path) || '.txt'
    37→
    38→  const [yearToken, monthToken] = timestampPartition(parsed.started_at || importedAt)
    39→
    40→  const repoRoot = join(root, 'Memory', '06_transcripts')
    41→  const repoRawPath = join(repoRoot, 'raw', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}${sourceSuffix}`)
    42→  const repoCleanPath = join(repoRoot, 'clean', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.md`)
    43→  const repoManifestPath = join(repoRoot, 'manifests', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
    44→
    45→  const globalRawPath = join(globalRoot, 'raw', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}${sourceSuffix}`)
    46→  const globalCleanPath = join(globalRoot, 'clean', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.md`)
    47→  const globalManifestPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'manifests', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
    48→  const globalEventLogPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'sessions.jsonl')
    49→  const globalDbPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'search.sqlite')
    50→
    51→  for (const p of [globalRawPath, globalCleanPath, globalManifestPath, globalEventLogPath, globalDbPath]) {
    52→    mkdirSync(dirname(p), { recursive: true })
    53→  }
    54→  if (mirrorToRepo) {
    55→    for (const p of [repoRawPath, repoCleanPath, repoManifestPath]) {
    56→      mkdirSync(dirname(p), { recursive: true })
    57→    }
    58→  }
    59→
    60→  if (mirrorToRepo) {
    61→    copyFile(parsed.source_path, repoRawPath)
    62→  }
    63→  copyFile(parsed.source_path, globalRawPath)
    64→
    65→  let manifest: ManifestEntry = {
    66→    client: parsed.client,
    67→    project: projectSlug,
    68→    session_id: parsed.session_id,
    69→    title: parsed.title,
    70→    started_at: parsed.started_at,
    71→    imported_at: importedAt,
    72→    cwd: parsed.cwd,
    73→    branch: parsed.branch,
    74→    raw_source_path: toPosixPath(parsed.source_path),
    75→    raw_sha256: rawSha256,
    76→    raw_upload_permission: rawUploadPermission,
    77→    repo_raw_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoRawPath)) : '',
    78→    repo_clean_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoCleanPath)) : '',
    79→    repo_manifest_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoManifestPath)) : '',
    80→    global_raw_path: toPosixPath(globalRawPath),
    81→    global_clean_path: toPosixPath(globalCleanPath),
    82→    global_manifest_path: toPosixPath(globalManifestPath),
    83→    message_count: parsed.messages.length,
    84→    tool_event_count: parsed.tool_events.length,
    85→    cleaning_mode: 'deterministic-code',
    86→    repo_mirror_enabled: mirrorToRepo,
    87→  }
    88→
    89→  const existingGlobalManifest = loadJson(globalManifestPath)
    90→  manifest = preserveExistingImportTimestamp(existingGlobalManifest, manifest)
    91→
    92→  if (mirrorToRepo) {
    93→    writeCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest, repoCleanPath)
    94→  }
    95→  writeCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest, globalCleanPath)
    96→  if (mirrorToRepo) {
    97→    writeJson(repoManifestPath, manifest)
    98→  }
    99→  const appendToEventLog = existingGlobalManifest === null || !deepEqual(existingGlobalManifest, manifest)
   100→  writeJson(globalManifestPath, manifest)
   101→  if (appendToEventLog) {
   102→    appendJsonl(globalEventLogPath, manifest)
   103→  }
   104→  await upsertSearchIndex(globalDbPath, manifest)
   105→
   106→  return manifest
   107→}
   108→
   109→export function transcriptHasContent(parsed: ParsedTranscript): boolean {
   110→  return parsed.messages.length > 0 || parsed.tool_events.length > 0
   111→}
   112→
   113→export function writeCleanMarkdown(parsed: ParsedTranscript, manifest: ManifestEntry, filePath: string): void {
   114→  const lines: string[] = [
   115→    '---',
   116→    `client: ${manifest.client}`,
   117→    `project: ${manifest.project}`,
   118→    `session_id: ${manifest.session_id}`,
   119→    `title: ${yamlEscape(manifest.title)}`,
   120→    `started_at: ${manifest.started_at}`,
   121→    `imported_at: ${manifest.imported_at}`,
   122→    `cwd: ${yamlEscape(manifest.cwd)}`,
   123→    `branch: ${yamlEscape(manifest.branch)}`,
   124→    `raw_source_path: ${yamlEscape(manifest.raw_source_path)}`,
   125→    `raw_sha256: ${manifest.raw_sha256}`,
   126→    `raw_upload_permission: ${manifest.raw_upload_permission}`,
   127→    `cleaning_mode: ${manifest.cleaning_mode}`,
   128→    '---',
   129→    '',
   130→    `# ${manifest.title || manifest.session_id}`,
   131→    '',
   132→    '## Metadata',
   133→    `- Client: \`${manifest.client}\``,
   134→    `- Project: \`${manifest.project}\``,
   135→    `- Session ID: \`${manifest.session_id}\``,
   136→    `- Started At: \`${manifest.started_at}\``,
   137→    `- Imported At: \`${manifest.imported_at}\``,
   138→    `- Raw SHA256: \`${manifest.raw_sha256}\``,
   139→    `- Raw Source: \`${manifest.raw_source_path}\``,
   140→    `- Repo Raw Path: \`${manifest.repo_raw_path}\``,
   141→    `- Repo Clean Path: \`${manifest.repo_clean_path}\``,
   142→    '',
   143→    '## Messages',
   144→  ]
   145→
   146→  if (parsed.messages.length > 0) {
   147→    for (let i = 0; i < parsed.messages.length; i++) {
   148→      const message = parsed.messages[i]!
   149→      lines.push(
   150→        `### ${i + 1}. ${message.role}`,
   151→        `- Timestamp: \`${message.timestamp ?? manifest.started_at}\``,
   152→        '',
   153→        message.text,
   154→        '',
   155→      )
   156→    }
   157→  } else {
   158→    lines.push(
   159→      'No user or assistant messages were extracted deterministically from the source transcript.',
   160→      '',
   161→    )
   162→  }
   163→
   164→  lines.push('## Tool Events')
   165→  if (parsed.tool_events.length > 0) {
   166→    for (const event of parsed.tool_events) {
   167→      lines.push(`- \`${event.timestamp ?? manifest.started_at}\` ${event.summary}`)
   168→    }
   169→  } else {
   170→    lines.push('- No tool events were extracted.')
   171→  }
   172→  lines.push('')
   173→
   174→  writeFileSync(filePath, lines.join('\n'), 'utf-8')
   175→}
   176→
   177→export function preserveExistingImportTimestamp(
   178→  existing: Record<string, unknown> | null,
   179→  payload: ManifestEntry,
   180→): ManifestEntry {
   181→  if (existing === null) return payload
   182→  if (!deepEqual(manifestSignature(existing), manifestSignature(payload))) return payload
   183→  const importedAt = existing['imported_at']
   184→  if (typeof importedAt === 'string' && importedAt) {
   185→    return { ...payload, imported_at: importedAt }
   186→  }
   187→  return payload
   188→}
   189→
   190→export function manifestSignature(payload: Record<string, unknown>): Record<string, unknown> {
   191→  const result: Record<string, unknown> = {}
   192→  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(payload)) {
   193→    if (key !== 'imported_at') {
   194→      result[key] = value
   195→    }
   196→  }
   197→  return result
   198→}
   199→
   200→export function manifestChanged(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): boolean {
   201→  if (!existsSync(filePath)) return true
   202→  try {
   203→    const current = JSON.parse(readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')) as Record<string, unknown>
   204→    return !deepEqual(current, payload)
   205→  } catch {
   206→    return true
   207→  }
   208→}
   209→
   210→export function writeJson(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {
   211→  writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf-8')
   212→}
   213→
   214→export function appendJsonl(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {
   215→  appendFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(payload) + '\n', 'utf-8')
   216→}
   217→
   218→export function copyFile(source: string, destination: string): void {
   219→  if (source === destination) return
   220→  copyFileSync(source, destination)
   221→}
   222→
   223→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   224→// Internal helpers
   225→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   226→
   227→function stemOf(filePath: string): string {
   228→  const base = filePath.replace(/\\/g, '/').split('/').pop() ?? ''
   229→  const ext = extname(base)
   230→  return ext ? base.slice(0, -ext.length) : base
   231→}
   232→
   233→function deepEqual(a: unknown, b: unknown): boolean {
   234→  if (a === b) return true
   235→  if (a === null || b === null || typeof a !== typeof b) return false
   236→  if (typeof a !== 'object') return false
   237→  if (Array.isArray(a) !== Array.isArray(b)) return false
   238→  const aObj = a as Record<string, unknown>
   239→  const bObj = b as Record<string, unknown>
   240→  const aKeys = Object.keys(aObj)
   241→  const bKeys = Object.keys(bObj)
   242→  if (aKeys.length !== bKeys.length) return false
   243→  return aKeys.every(key => deepEqual(aObj[key], bObj[key]))
   244→}
   245→

  "content": "import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach, afterEach } from 'vitest'\nimport { mkdtempSync, writeFileSync, readFileSync, existsSync, rmSync } from 'node:fs'\nimport { join } from 'node:path'\nimport { tmpdir } from 'node:os'\n\nimport type { ManifestEntry, ParsedTranscript } from '../../src/types/transcript.js'\nimport {\n  importTranscript,\n  transcriptHasContent,\n  writeCleanMarkdown,\n  preserveExistingImportTimestamp,\n  manifestSignature,\n  manifestChanged,\n  writeJson,\n  appendJsonl,\n  copyFile,\n} from '../../src/transcript/import.js'\n\nfunction makeParsed(overrides: Partial<ParsedTranscript> = {}): ParsedTranscript {\n  return {\n    client: 'codex',\n    session_id: 'test-session',\n    title: 'Test Session',\n    started_at: '2024-06-15T12:00:00Z',\n    cwd: '/home/user/project',\n    branch: 'main',\n    messages: [\n      { role: 'user', text: 'Hello', timestamp: '2024-06-15T12:00:00Z' },\n      { role: 'assistant', text: 'Hi there', timestamp: '2024-06-15T12:00:01Z' },\n    ],\n    tool_events: [\n      { summary: 'read_file input=\"test.ts\"', timestamp: '2024-06-15T12:00:02Z' },\n    ],\n    source_path: '',\n    ...overrides,\n  }\n}\n\nfunction makeManifest(overrides: Partial<ManifestEntry> = {}): ManifestEntry {\n  return {\n    client: 'codex',\n    project: 'test-project',\n    session_id: 'test-session',\n    raw_sha256: 'abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890',\n    title: 'Test Session',\n    started_at: '2024-06-15T12:00:00Z',\n    imported_at: '2024-06-15T13:00:00Z',\n    cwd: '/home/user/project',\n    branch: 'main',\n    raw_source_path: '/home/user/.codex/sessions/test.jsonl',\n    raw_upload_permission: 'none',\n    global_raw_path: '/home/user/.memorytree/transcripts/raw/codex/test-project/2024/06/test__abcdef12.jsonl',\n    global_clean_path: '/home/user/.memorytree/transcripts/clean/codex/test-project/2024/06/test__abcdef12.md',\n    global_manifest_path: '/home/user/.memorytree/transcripts/index/manifests/codex/test-project/2024/06/test__abcdef12.json',\n    repo_raw_path: 'Memory/06_transcripts/raw/codex/2024/06/test__abcdef12.jsonl',\n    repo_clean_path: 'Memory/06_transcripts/clean/codex/2024/06/test__abcdef12.md',\n    repo_manifest_path: 'Memory/06_transcripts/manifests/codex/2024/06/test__abcdef12.json',\n    message_count: 2,\n    tool_event_count: 1,\n    cleaning_mode: 'deterministic-code',\n    repo_mirror_enabled: true,\n    ...overrides,\n  }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// transcriptHasContent\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('transcriptHasContent', () => {\n  it('returns true when messages exist', () => {\n    expect(transcriptHasContent(makeParsed())).toBe(true)\n  })\n\n  it('returns true when only tool_events exist', () => {\n    expect(transcriptHasContent(makeParsed({ messages: [], tool_events: [{ summary: 'tool', timestamp: null }] }))).toBe(true)\n  })\n\n  it('returns false when both empty', () => {\n    expect(transcriptHasContent(makeParsed({ messages: [], tool_events: [] }))).toBe(false)\n  })\n})\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// writeCleanMarkdown\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('writeCleanMarkdown', () => {\n  let tmpDir: string\n\n  beforeEach(() => { tmpDir = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'clean-md-')) })\n  afterEach(() => { rmSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true, force: true }) })\n\n  it('writes markdown with frontmatter and messages', () => {\n    const filePath = join(tmpDir, 'test.md')\n    const parsed = makeParsed()\n    const manifest = makeManifest()\n    writeCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest, filePath)\n\n    const content = readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')\n    expect(content).toContain('---')\n    expect(content).toContain('client: codex')\n    expect(content).toContain('## Messages')\n    expect(content).toContain('### 1. user')\n    expect(content).toContain('Hello')\n    expect(content).toContain('### 2. assistant')\n    expect(content).toContain('Hi there')\n    expect(content).toContain('## Tool Events')\n    expect(content).toContain('read_file')\n  })\n\n  it('writes no-messages placeholder when messages empty', () => {\n    const filePath = join(tmpDir, 'empty.md')\n    const parsed = makeParsed({ messages: [] })\n    const manifest = makeManifest()\n    writeCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest, filePath)\n\n    const content = readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')\n    expect(content).toContain('No user or assistant messages')\n  })\n\n  it('writes no-tool-events placeholder when tool_events empty', () => {\n    const filePath = join(tmpDir, 'no-tools.md')\n    const parsed = makeParsed({ tool_events: [] })\n    const manifest = makeManifest()\n    writeCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest, filePath)\n\n    const content = readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')\n    expect(content).toContain('No tool events were extracted.')\n  })\n})\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// preserveExistingImportTimestamp\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('preserveExistingImportTimestamp', () => {\n  it('returns payload when existing is null', () => {\n    const payload = makeManifest()\n    expect(preserveExistingImportTimestamp(null, payload)).toBe(payload)\n  })\n\n  it('preserves imported_at when signatures match', () => {\n    const existing = { ...makeManifest(), imported_at: '2024-01-01T00:00:00Z' } as Record<string, unknown>\n    const payload = makeManifest({ imported_at: '2024-06-15T13:00:00Z' })\n    const result = preserveExistingImportTimestamp(existing, payload)\n    expect(result.imported_at).toBe('2024-01-01T00:00:00Z')\n  })\n\n  it('returns new payload when signatures differ', () => {\n    const existing = { ...makeManifest({ title: 'old' }), imported_at: '2024-01-01T00:00:00Z' } as Record<string, unknown>\n    const payload = makeManifest({ title: 'new', imported_at: '2024-06-15T13:00:00Z' })\n    const result = preserveExistingImportTimestamp(existing, payload)\n    expect(result.imported_at).toBe('2024-06-15T13:00:00Z')\n  })\n})\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// manifestSignature\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('manifestSignature', () => {\n  it('excludes imported_at', () => {\n    const sig = manifestSignature({ a: 1, imported_at: 'x', b: 2 })\n    expect(sig).toEqual({ a: 1, b: 2 })\n  })\n})\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// manifestChanged\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('manifestChanged', () => {\n  let tmpDir: string\n\n  beforeEach(() => { tmpDir = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'manifest-')) })\n  afterEach(() => { rmSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true, force: true }) })\n\n  it('returns true for non-existent file', () => {\n    expect(manifestChanged(join(tmpDir, 'missing.json'), { a: 1 })).toBe(true)\n  })\n\n  it('returns false when content matches', () => {\n    const filePath = join(tmpDir, 'test.json')\n    writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify({ a: 1 }))\n    expect(manifestChanged(filePath, { a: 1 })).toBe(false)\n  })\n\n  it('returns true when content differs', () => {\n    const filePath = join(tmpDir, 'test.json')\n    writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify({ a: 1 }))\n    expect(manifestChanged(filePath, { a: 2 })).toBe(true)\n  })\n})\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// writeJson / appendJsonl\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('writeJson', () => {\n  let tmpDir: string\n\n  beforeEach(() => { tmpDir = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'json-')) })\n  afterEach(() => { rmSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true, force: true }) })\n\n  it('writes formatted JSON with trailing newline', () => {\n    const filePath = join(tmpDir, 'test.json')\n    writeJson(filePath, { a: 1, b: 'hello' })\n    const content = readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')\n    expect(content).toBe('{\\n  \"a\": 1,\\n  \"b\": \"hello\"\\n}\\n')\n  })\n})\n\ndescribe('appendJsonl', () => {\n  let tmpDir: string\n\n  beforeEach(() => { tmpDir = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'jsonl-')) })\n  afterEach(() => { rmSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true, force: true }) })\n\n  it('appends single JSON line', () => {\n    const filePath = join(tmpDir, 'test.jsonl')\n    writeFileSync(filePath, '')\n    appendJsonl(filePath, { a: 1 })\n    appendJsonl(filePath, { b: 2 })\n    const lines = readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8').trim().split('\\n')\n    expect(lines).toHaveLength(2)\n    expect(JSON.parse(lines[0]!)).toEqual({ a: 1 })\n    expect(JSON.parse(lines[1]!)).toEqual({ b: 2 })\n  })\n})\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// copyFile\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('copyFile', () => {\n  let tmpDir: string\n\n  beforeEach(() => { tmpDir = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'copy-')) })\n  afterEach(() => { rmSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true, force: true }) })\n\n  it('copies file to destination', () => {\n    const src = join(tmpDir, 'src.txt')\n    const dst = join(tmpDir, 'dst.txt')\n    writeFileSync(src, 'hello')\n    copyFile(src, dst)\n    expect(readFileSync(dst, 'utf-8')).toBe('hello')\n  })\n\n  it('skips when source equals destination', () => {\n    const src = join(tmpDir, 'same.txt')\n    writeFileSync(src, 'hello')\n    copyFile(src, src)\n    expect(readFileSync(src, 'utf-8')).toBe('hello')\n  })\n})\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// importTranscript (end-to-end)\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('importTranscript', () => {\n  let tmpDir: string\n  let repoRoot: string\n  let globalRoot: string\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    tmpDir = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'import-'))\n    repoRoot = join(tmpDir, 'repo')\n    globalRoot = join(tmpDir, 'global')\n  })\n  afterEach(() => {\n    rmSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true, force: true })\n  })\n\n  it('imports a transcript and creates all expected files', async () => {\n    const sourceFile = join(tmpDir, 'test.jsonl')\n    writeFileSync(sourceFile, '{\"type\":\"session_meta\",\"payload\":{\"id\":\"s1\"}}\\n')\n\n    const parsed = makeParsed({ source_path: sourceFile })\n    const result = await importTranscript(parsed, repoRoot, globalRoot, 'my-project', 'none', true)\n\n    expect(result.client).toBe('codex')\n    expect(result.project).toBe('my-project')\n    expect(result.message_count).toBe(2)\n    expect(result.tool_event_count).toBe(1)\n    expect(result.cleaning_mode).toBe('deterministic-code')\n    expect(result.repo_mirror_enabled).toBe(true)\n\n    // Verify files exist\n    expect(existsSync(join(repoRoot, result.repo_raw_path))).toBe(true)\n    expect(existsSync(join(repoRoot, result.repo_clean_path))).toBe(true)\n    expect(existsSync(join(repoRoot, result.repo_manifest_path))).toBe(true)\n  })\n\n  it('imports without repo mirror', async () => {\n    const sourceFile = join(tmpDir, 'test2.jsonl')\n    writeFileSync(sourceFile, '{\"type\":\"test\"}\\n')\n\n    const parsed = makeParsed({ source_path: sourceFile })\n    const result = await importTranscript(parsed, repoRoot, globalRoot, 'my-project', 'none', false)\n\n    expect(result.repo_raw_path).toBe('')\n    expect(result.repo_clean_path).toBe('')\n    expect(result.repo_manifest_path).toBe('')\n    expect(result.repo_mirror_enabled).toBe(false)\n  })\n\n  it('preserves imported_at on idempotent re-import', async () => {\n    const sourceFile = join(tmpDir, 'test3.jsonl')\n    writeFileSync(sourceFile, '{\"type\":\"test\"}\\n')\n\n    const parsed = makeParsed({ source_path: sourceFile })\n    const first = await importTranscript(parsed, repoRoot, globalRoot, 'my-project', 'none')\n    const firstImportedAt = first.imported_at\n\n    // Re-import (manifest exists, signature unchanged)\n    const second = await importTranscript(parsed, repoRoot, globalRoot, 'my-project', 'none')\n    expect(second.imported_at).toBe(firstImportedAt)\n  })\n})\n"
}

Show input payload 
{
  "file_path": "D:\\demo1\\memorytree-workflow\\src\\transcript\\index.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * Transcript module — barrel re-export of all public APIs.\n */\n\n// Types\nexport type { Client, TranscriptMessage, TranscriptToolEvent, ParsedTranscript, ManifestEntry } from '../types/transcript.js'\n\n// Constants\nexport {\n  CLIENTS,\n  TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES,\n  SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES,\n  TOOL_USE_TYPES,\n  TOOL_RESULT_TYPES,\n} from './common.js'\n\n// Common utilities\nexport {\n  slugify,\n  sha256File,\n  contentHash,\n  normalizeTimestamp,\n  earliestTimestamp,\n  parseIsoTimestamp,\n  timestampPartition,\n  joinParagraphs,\n  summarizeValue,\n  truncate,\n  yamlEscape,\n  ensureDict,\n  ensureList,\n  getNested,\n  loadJsonl,\n  loadJson,\n  extractTextBlocks,\n  extractSimpleText,\n  extractGeminiText,\n  extractGeminiParts,\n  findFirstMappingWithKeys,\n  deduplicateMessages,\n  deduplicateToolEvents,\n} from './common.js'\n\n// Parsing\nexport {\n  inferClient,\n  parseTranscript,\n  parseCodexTranscript,\n  parseClaudeTranscript,\n  parseGeminiTranscript,\n} from './parse.js'\n\n// Database\nexport { upsertSearchIndex } from './db.js'\n\n// Discovery\nexport {\n  defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot,\n  defaultClientRoots,\n  discoverSourceFiles,\n  inferProjectSlug,\n  transcriptMatchesRepo,\n  projectSlugsMatch,\n  safeFileMtime,\n} from './discover.js'\n\n// Import\nexport {\n  importTranscript,\n  transcriptHasContent,\n  writeCleanMarkdown,\n  preserveExistingImportTimestamp,\n  manifestSignature,\n  manifestChanged,\n  writeJson,\n  appendJsonl,\n  copyFile,\n} from './import.js'\n"
}

Tool Call #184 Write toolu_01SRDRRRduS97FN2Zra29435 09:36:10
Write input={"content":"import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach, afterEach } from 'vitest'\nimport { mkdtempSync, writeFileSync, readFileSync, existsSync, rmSync } from 'node:fs'\nimport ...
Show input payload 
{
  "file_path": "D:\\demo1\\memorytree-workflow\\tests\\transcript\\integration.test.ts",
  "content": "import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach, afterEach } from 'vitest'\nimport { mkdtempSync, writeFileSync, readFileSync, existsSync, rmSync } from 'node:fs'\nimport { join } from 'node:path'\nimport { tmpdir } from 'node:os'\nimport initSqlJs from 'sql.js'\n\nimport { parseCodexTranscript } from '../../src/transcript/parse.js'\nimport { importTranscript, transcriptHasContent } from '../../src/transcript/import.js'\nimport { inferProjectSlug } from '../../src/transcript/discover.js'\n\ndescribe('integration: parse → import → verify', () => {\n  let tmpDir: string\n  let repoRoot: string\n  let globalRoot: string\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    tmpDir = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'integration-'))\n    repoRoot = join(tmpDir, 'repo')\n    globalRoot = join(tmpDir, 'global')\n  })\n  afterEach(() => {\n    rmSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true, force: true })\n  })\n\n  it('end-to-end: create JSONL → parse → import → verify files', async () => {\n    // 1. Create a realistic Codex JSONL transcript\n    const sourceFile = join(tmpDir, 'test-session.jsonl')\n    const records = [\n      { type: 'session_meta', payload: { id: 'sess-001', title: 'Fix bug', cwd: '/home/user/myproject', git: { branch: 'main' }, timestamp: '2024-06-15T10:00:00Z' } },\n      { type: 'response_item', timestamp: '2024-06-15T10:00:01Z', payload: { type: 'message', role: 'user', content: [{ type: 'input_text', text: 'Fix the login bug' }] } },\n      { type: 'response_item', timestamp: '2024-06-15T10:00:02Z', payload: { type: 'message', role: 'assistant', content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'I will fix the login bug for you.' }] } },\n      { type: 'response_item', timestamp: '2024-06-15T10:00:03Z', payload: { type: 'function_call', name: 'read_file', arguments: { path: 'login.ts' } } },\n      { type: 'response_item', timestamp: '2024-06-15T10:00:04Z', payload: { type: 'function_call_output', name: 'read_file', output: 'file contents here' } },\n    ]\n    writeFileSync(sourceFile, records.map(r => JSON.stringify(r)).join('\\n') + '\\n')\n\n    // 2. Parse\n    const parsed = parseCodexTranscript(sourceFile)\n    expect(parsed.client).toBe('codex')\n    expect(parsed.session_id).toBe('sess-001')\n    expect(parsed.title).toBe('Fix bug')\n    expect(parsed.cwd).toBe('/home/user/myproject')\n    expect(parsed.branch).toBe('main')\n    expect(parsed.messages).toHaveLength(2)\n    expect(parsed.tool_events).toHaveLength(2)\n    expect(transcriptHasContent(parsed)).toBe(true)\n\n    // 3. Infer project slug\n    const slug = inferProjectSlug(parsed)\n    expect(slug).toBe('myproject')\n\n    // 4. Import\n    const manifest = await importTranscript(parsed, repoRoot, globalRoot, slug, 'none', true)\n\n    // 5. Verify manifest fields\n    expect(manifest.client).toBe('codex')\n    expect(manifest.project).toBe('myproject')\n    expect(manifest.session_id).toBe('sess-001')\n    expect(manifest.message_count).toBe(2)\n    expect(manifest.tool_event_count).toBe(2)\n    expect(manifest.cleaning_mode).toBe('deterministic-code')\n    expect(manifest.repo_mirror_enabled).toBe(true)\n\n    // 6. Verify raw file copied to repo + global\n    expect(existsSync(join(repoRoot, manifest.repo_raw_path))).toBe(true)\n\n    // 7. Verify clean markdown has correct frontmatter\n    const cleanContent = readFileSync(join(repoRoot, manifest.repo_clean_path), 'utf-8')\n    expect(cleanContent).toContain('---')\n    expect(cleanContent).toContain('client: codex')\n    expect(cleanContent).toContain('project: myproject')\n    expect(cleanContent).toContain('## Messages')\n    expect(cleanContent).toContain('### 1. user')\n    expect(cleanContent).toContain('Fix the login bug')\n    expect(cleanContent).toContain('### 2. assistant')\n    expect(cleanContent).toContain('I will fix the login bug for you.')\n    expect(cleanContent).toContain('## Tool Events')\n    expect(cleanContent).toContain('read_file')\n\n    // 8. Verify manifest JSON written\n    const manifestContent = JSON.parse(\n      readFileSync(join(repoRoot, manifest.repo_manifest_path), 'utf-8'),\n    )\n    expect(manifestContent.client).toBe('codex')\n    expect(manifestContent.project).toBe('myproject')\n\n    // 9. Verify SQLite index updated\n    const dbPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'search.sqlite')\n    expect(existsSync(dbPath)).toBe(true)\n    const SQL = await initSqlJs()\n    const db = new SQL.Database(readFileSync(dbPath))\n    const rows = db.exec('SELECT client, project, session_id FROM transcripts')\n    expect(rows).toHaveLength(1)\n    expect(rows[0]!.values).toEqual([['codex', 'myproject', 'sess-001']])\n    db.close()\n\n    // 10. Verify event log written\n    const eventLogPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'sessions.jsonl')\n    expect(existsSync(eventLogPath)).toBe(true)\n    const eventLines = readFileSync(eventLogPath, 'utf-8').trim().split('\\n')\n    expect(eventLines).toHaveLength(1)\n    const event = JSON.parse(eventLines[0]!)\n    expect(event.client).toBe('codex')\n  })\n\n  it('idempotent re-import preserves imported_at', async () => {\n    const sourceFile = join(tmpDir, 'idem.jsonl')\n    writeFileSync(sourceFile, '{\"type\":\"session_meta\",\"payload\":{\"id\":\"s1\",\"title\":\"test\"}}\\n')\n\n    const parsed = parseCodexTranscript(sourceFile)\n    const first = await importTranscript(parsed, repoRoot, globalRoot, 'proj', 'none')\n    const second = await importTranscript(parsed, repoRoot, globalRoot, 'proj', 'none')\n\n    expect(second.imported_at).toBe(first.imported_at)\n  })\n\n  it('Claude transcript end-to-end', async () => {\n    const sourceFile = join(tmpDir, 'claude-session.jsonl')\n    const records = [\n      { type: 'user', sessionId: 'cs1', cwd: '/proj', gitBranch: 'dev', timestamp: '2024-06-15T10:00:00Z', message: { role: 'user', content: 'Hello Claude' } },\n      { type: 'assistant', sessionId: 'cs1', timestamp: '2024-06-15T10:00:01Z', message: { role: 'assistant', content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Hello!' }] } },\n    ]\n    writeFileSync(sourceFile, records.map(r => JSON.stringify(r)).join('\\n') + '\\n')\n\n    const { parseClaudeTranscript } = await import('../../src/transcript/parse.js')\n    const parsed = parseClaudeTranscript(sourceFile)\n    expect(parsed.client).toBe('claude')\n    expect(parsed.messages).toHaveLength(2)\n\n    const manifest = await importTranscript(parsed, repoRoot, globalRoot, 'test-proj', 'none')\n    expect(manifest.client).toBe('claude')\n    expect(manifest.message_count).toBe(2)\n  })\n})\n"
}

Show output payload 
1→# memorytree-workflow — Project Memory
     2→
     3→## Project Overview
     4→
     5→MemoryTree Skill implementation repo (`beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow`). Provides transcript import, dedup, indexing, and session continuity for AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI).
     6→
     7→## Key Architecture
     8→
     9→- **Scripts dir**: `scripts/` — all transcript processing modules
    10→- **Tests**: 7 test files in `tests/`, 231 tests total, 80% coverage
    11→  - `test_transcript_utils.py` — transcript parsing/import (76 tests)
    12→  - `test_heartbeat_modules.py` — P0 config/lock/alert/log (27 tests)
    13→  - `test_integration.py` — end-to-end + heartbeat function-level (27 tests)
    14→  - `test_daemon.py` — memorytree_daemon.py install/uninstall/status/helpers (21 tests)
    15→  - `test_scaffold_utils.py`, `test_locale_utils.py`, `test_upgrade_checks.py`
    16→- **Python**: No local install; use `uv run python` to execute (Windows Store python stub returns exit code 49). Coverage installed via `uv tool install coverage`.
    17→- **Module structure** (P1 split, commit 2aea9da):
    18→  - `_transcript_common.py` — constants, utilities, text extraction, dedup helpers
    19→  - `_transcript_parse.py` — dataclasses + 3 client parsers (Codex/Claude/Gemini)
    20→  - `_transcript_import.py` — import, clean, manifest
    21→  - `_transcript_index.py` — SQLite index
    22→  - `_transcript_discover.py` — file discovery, project matching
    23→  - `_transcript_utils.py` — backward-compatible re-export hub
    24→- **P0 heartbeat modules** (code complete, tests done):
    25→  - `_config_utils.py` — TOML config load/save, interval parsing, project registration
    26→  - `_lock_utils.py` — PID-based lock file with stale detection
    27→  - `_alert_utils.py` — alerts.json management, dedup, threshold-based writes
    28→  - `_log_utils.py` — logging setup with file rotation + stderr
    29→  - `heartbeat.py` — main heartbeat logic, sensitive pattern scanning
    30→  - `memorytree_daemon.py` — CLI entry point (install/uninstall/run-once/watch)
    31→
    32→## Completed Work
    33→
    34→### P1: Transcript dedup (commit 9091b33)
    35→- `deduplicate_messages()` / `deduplicate_tool_events()` in `_transcript_common.py`
    36→- Signature: `(timestamp, role, sha256_prefix)` for messages, `(timestamp, sha256_prefix)` for tool events
    37→- sha256 prefix = 16-char hex (`hashlib.sha256(text.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]`)
    38→- All 3 parsers call dedup before building `ParsedTranscript`
    39→- Gemini's inline `message_signatures` set removed in favor of shared dedup
    40→- 17 new tests (7 message unit, 4 tool event unit, 6 parser integration)
    41→
    42→### P1: Module split (commit 2aea9da)
    43→- Split monolithic `_transcript_utils.py` into 5 focused modules (all ≤400 lines)
    44→
    45→### P1: CI pipeline (commit 410da8b)
    46→- `.github/workflows/ci.yml` — triggered on push/PR to master
    47→- Matrix: Python 3.11/3.12/3.13 × ubuntu/macos/windows (9 combos)
    48→- `coverage run -m unittest discover -s tests` + `--fail-under=80`
    49→- ubuntu+3.13 uploads `coverage.xml` artifact
    50→
    51→### P1: Integration tests (commit bebbc0f, expanded feb18cb)
    52→- `tests/test_integration.py` — 7 test classes, 27 tests
    53→- Scenario 1: init → parse → import e2e
    54→- Scenario 2: discover batch scan (3 client layouts)
    55→- Scenario 3: heartbeat sensitive pattern detection
    56→- Scenario 4: heartbeat function-level tests (main, _run_heartbeat, _process_project, _git_commit_and_push, _try_push, _git)
    57→- `heartbeat.py` coverage: 93% (up from 25%)
    58→
    59→### P0: Daemon unit tests (commit 2a31d80)
    60→- `tests/test_daemon.py` — 21 tests
    61→- cmd_install: Linux/macOS/Windows dispatch, --interval/--auto-push overrides, duplicate rejection
    62→- cmd_uninstall: 3 platforms (cron filter, launchctl unload, schtasks /delete)
    63→- cmd_run_once, cmd_status (registered+locked / unregistered+unlocked)
    64→- Helpers: _heartbeat_script_path, _python_path (with/without uv)
    65→- Platform detection: _is_cron/launchd/schtasks_registered (positive + negative)
    66→- `memorytree_daemon.py` coverage: 72%
    67→
    68→### P0: Heartbeat module unit tests (commit c8c5d28)
    69→- `tests/test_heartbeat_modules.py` — 27 tests
    70→- Covers _config_utils, _lock_utils, _alert_utils, _log_utils
    71→- Windows caveat: logging FileHandler holds file locks; must close handlers before TemporaryDirectory cleanup
    72→
    73→### P0.5: Session continuity (commit a47dea9)
    74→- Cross-client context restore
    75→
    76→## TODO Status
    77→
    78→See `TODO.md` for full details. Summary:
    79→- P0 (heartbeat daemon): code complete, all tests done (heartbeat modules + daemon + integration); only "first install trigger" (pure AI instruction) remains unchecked
    80→- P0.5 (session continuity): done
    81→- P1 (code quality): all done (dedup, module split, CI pipeline, integration tests)
    82→- P2/P3: blocked on P0
    83→

<status>completed</status>
<summary>Agent "Implement db.ts + tests" completed</summary>
<result>Both files are complete and all tests pass. Here is a summary:

## Implementation

D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow\src\transcript\db.ts -- Port of _transcript_index.py:
- Exports upsertSearchIndex(dbPath, manifest) returning Promise<void>
- Uses sql.js with a lazily cached WASM init promise (getSqlJs())
- Opens existing db file or creates new one
- Runs PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL, creates the transcripts table (18 columns, composite PK of 4), then performs INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET on the 14 non-PK data columns
- Exports the in-memory db to disk via writeFileSync(dbPath, Buffer.from(db.export())) and closes in a try/finally
- Parameter type is ManifestEntry (from src/types/transcript.js) rather than Record<string, unknown> to avoid strict-mode index-signature incompatibility
- Column lists (PK_COLUMNS, DATA_COLUMNS, ALL_COLUMNS) are defined as as const arrays and used to build SQL strings, avoiding duplication

D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow\tests\transcript\db.test.ts -- 6 tests, all passing:
1. Creates a new db file and inserts one record, verified by reading back with sql.js
2. Upsert -- inserts then updates same PK, verifies updated fields and single row
3. Table schema has exactly 18 columns with correct names
4. Inserts 3 different records, verifies all present
5. Opens existing db and preserves previous records across calls
6. Composite primary key enforcement (same session_id, different raw_sha256 = 2 rows)

Additional change: Installed @types/sql.js as a dev dependency to satisfy strict type checking.</result>

<status>completed</status>
<summary>Agent "Implement parse.ts + tests" completed</summary>
<result>The 6 failures are pre-existing in discover.test.ts (they're reading real filesystem paths, not related to my changes). My new parse tests (35 tests) all pass, along with the existing smoke (5) and common (111) and db (6) tests.

Here is a summary of what was implemented:

---

Implementation file: D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow\src\transcript\parse.ts

Ported the full Python _transcript_parse.py module to TypeScript, exporting 5 functions:

1. inferClient(client, sourcePath) - Auto-detects client from path patterns using toPosixPath for normalization. Matches /.codex/, rollout-, /.claude/, /projects/, /.gemini/, checkpoint. Throws Error (not SystemExit) for unrecognized paths.

2. parseTranscript(client, sourcePath) - Dispatches to the appropriate parser after calling inferClient.

3. parseCodexTranscript(filePath) - JSONL parser handling session_meta, response_item/event_msg records with all payload types (message, user_message/agent_message, function_call/custom_tool_call and their output variants).

4. parseClaudeTranscript(filePath) - JSONL parser extracting sessionId, cwd, gitBranch from each record, processing content blocks (text, tool_use, tool_result, skipping thinking/reasoning).

5. parseGeminiTranscript(filePath) - JSON/JSONL parser with recursive visit() traversal, metadata extraction via findFirstMappingWithKeys, role normalization (model -> assistant), and tool detection from toolUse.name/toolName/functionName/tool.

All parsers apply deduplicateMessages and deduplicateToolEvents before returning.

Test file: D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow\tests\transcript\parse.test.ts

35 tests across 5 describe blocks:
- inferClient (9 tests): explicit client, all 3 auto-detect patterns, case insensitivity, error on unknown
- parseCodexTranscript (7 tests): session_meta + messages, user_message/agent_message, function_call/output, custom_tool_call/output, dedup, fallback IDs, unknown record skipping
- parseClaudeTranscript (7 tests): text blocks, string content, tool_use/tool_result, thinking skip, non-user/assistant skip, dedup, string blocks in arrays
- parseGeminiTranscript (8 tests): JSON file, JSONL file, toolUse.name, toolName, metadata extraction, dedup, fallback session_id, author field
- parseTranscript (4 tests): codex/claude/gemini dispatch, auto-infer from path</result>

<summary>Agent "Implement discover.ts + tests" completed</summary>
<result>All 187 tests pass across the full suite (5 test files, 0 failures).

Here is a summary of what was implemented:

D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow\src\transcript\discover.ts -- Full implementation with 7 exported functions:

1. defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot() -- returns ~/.memorytree/transcripts as a posix path
2. defaultClientRoots() -- returns { codex, claude, gemini } root directories
3. discoverSourceFiles(clients?, roots?) -- scans for transcript files using fast-glob with per-client glob patterns, deduplicates by resolved lowercase posix path, sorts by mtime descending. Added an optional roots parameter (not in the Python original) for testability, which defaults to defaultClientRoots().
4. inferProjectSlug(parsed) -- derives project slug from cwd basename, claude source_path parent (stripping ^[a-z]-- prefix), or gemini source_path parent
5. transcriptMatchesRepo(parsed, repoRoot, repoSlug) -- checks cwd equality/prefix match against repo root, falls back to slug matching
6. projectSlugsMatch(left, right) -- both non-empty, equal, and not 'unknown-project'
7. safeFileMtime(filePath) -- returns mtime in seconds or 0 on error

D:\demo1\memorytree-workflow\tests\transcript\discover.test.ts -- 30 tests covering all exported functions:

- defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot (2 tests): path content, posix format
- defaultClientRoots (2 tests): client keys, path content
- inferProjectSlug (7 tests): cwd-based, non-ASCII fallback, claude prefix stripping, gemini parent dir, codex fallback, cwd priority
- projectSlugsMatch (5 tests): positive match, different slugs, empty strings, unknown-project rejection
- transcriptMatchesRepo (5 tests): exact match, subdirectory match, sibling mismatch, empty cwd fallback, slug-based match
- safeFileMtime (2 tests): existing file, missing file
- discoverSourceFiles (7 tests): codex sessions, claude projects, gemini history, gemini checkpoints, missing root skip, mtime sort order, deduplication</result>

user #249 09:39:11

我们这是skill 是按sikll个格式来的吗

assistant #250 09:39:35

你是指 commit 的格式吗？

我们的 commit 遵循了项目 git-workflow.md 中定义的 conventional commits 格式：

<type>: <description>

<optional body>

这次的 commit：

feat: implement transcript core modules (Phase 1)

Port 5 Python transcript modules to TypeScript with 210 tests:
- common.ts: ...
- parse.ts: ...
...

- type = feat（新功能）
- 没有 Co-Authored-By（你的 settings.json 中已全局禁用 attribution）

如果你说的 "skill 格式" 是指别的东西（比如项目结构、发布格式、或某个具体的 /commit skill），请具体说明一下？
